title: Dromana
content:
Roof Restoration in Dromana

If you’re looking for professional roof restoration in Dromana, you’ve come to the right place. At Sandhurst Roofing, we bring over 30 years of experience restoring and protecting roofs across Melbourne’s south-east and the Mornington Peninsula. Our team is ready to help homeowners in Dromana with everything from minor repairs to full-scale restorations.Get a Free Quote!

Why choose Sandhurst Roofing for your Dromana property?

  • We specialise in roof restoration in Dromana — whether your roof is tiled, metal, or colour-bond, we’ve got the knowledge and tools to restore it.
  • Fully licensed, insured and committed to high-quality. We take the time to understand your requirements and tailor our services accordingly.
  • Local knowledge: Dromana’s coastal environment presents unique challenges—wind, salt spray, and sun exposure—and we incorporate these into our restoration plans, selecting products and techniques designed to endure.
  • A comprehensive service: from gutter repairs and replacement, through to re-pointing, tile replacement, colour bonding, and complete roof painting. We offer end-to-end solutions, eliminating the need to coordinate multiple trades.
Get a Free Quote!

Our Roof Restoration Process in Dromana

  1. Initial inspection & quote We’ll scrutinise your roof — checking for cracked or slipped tiles, rust or damage on metal roofs, deteriorated pointing or flashing, blocked gutters, and general wear and tear. After inspection, we provide a transparent quote so you know exactly what’s involved.
  2. Preparation & repair Before restoring the roof, we take care of the fundamentals: replace damaged materials, fix structural issues, clean gutters and downpipes, remove moss or debris, and ensure the substrate is sound. A quality restoration always starts with the proper groundwork.
  3. Restoration works Depending on your roof type and condition in Dromana, our restoration could include re-bedding and re-pointing tiles, painting or recoating metal roofs, installing new flashings or ridge capping, treating rust or corrosion, and installing high-quality gutters and downpipes.
  4. Final inspection & clean-up We believe in leaving your home as we found it — or better. After the job is done, we clean the site, inspect the work together, answer any questions and hand over the job with your long-term access to service and support.

What types of roofs do we restore?

 
  • Terracotta and concrete tile roofs (including cracked/slipped tiles, broken ridge capping).
  • Metal and flat metal roofs — whether original or more recent.
  • Colourbond® steel roofs (we help with full roof replacements as well as repairs and painting).
  • Guttering and downpipes are integral to roof performance — we’ll make sure your system not only looks good but works efficiently.

The Benefits of Restoring Your Roof in Dromana

 
  • Extended lifespan: A quality restoration in Dromana can give your roof many more years of reliable performance.
  • Improved appearance: A refreshed roof improves curb-appeal — essential for both enjoyment and property value.
  • Energy efficiency and protection: A well-sealed, well-maintained roof helps keep your home cooler in summer and safer in storm events.
  • Prevention of costly problems: Fixing minor issues early prevents leaks, mould, structural damage and the need for complete replacements.

What Our Customers Say

Steve was very punctual with coming to assess our roofing situation. He discussed with me every aspect of the job required for the replacement of our very old tin roof.This all happened at a particularly busy time for Steve’s company and he kept me up to date with the preparation of the job. Once it started it was a very slick operation completed within 4 days. I wasn’t there during the day but saw the results of progress each afternoon. They have done a very neat professional job and I am very happy with the result. Steve was a pleasure to deal with. Well done.

Cameron Kennedy-Miller
★★★★★

Quick response to request for estimate. Price matched that given by local plumber. Work commenced soon after acceptance of quote and as agreed. Standard of work very good – impressive. Corrugated iron roof replaced with ColourBond – 2 day’s work. (New insulation laid over old, no battens replaced, screwed down). Roof no longer leaking and good work around chimney flue. Adaptable to site requirements. Due regard to safety of residents and pets. Excellent site clean-up (choice of remove old iron or keep it). Would use this organisation again.

Collin Parker
★★★★★ View All Reviews

Ready to get started?

If you’re seeking reliable roof restoration in Dromana, contact Sandhurst Roofing today. We’ll arrange an inspection and provide a no-obligation quote. Our team is responsive, local to the region, and committed to delivering outstanding outcomes for your home. Call us on 0448 812 800 or complete our online form — let’s get your roof back to its best.Get a Quote!
